# Performance Plus Tire

> Family-owned wheel and tire specialist since 1978, headquartered in Long Beach, California. National online retailer with a physical showroom, focused on collector, classic, and antique vehicle tires alongside modern custom wheels. 48 years of fitment expertise, $1.2M inventory, and ready-to-install wheel and tire packages shipped nationwide.

Performance Plus Tire serves both the modern custom-wheel buyer and the collector/classic car community, including hard-to-find vintage sizes, whitewalls, and period-correct styling that mainstream retailers don't carry. Wheel and tire packages ship mounted, balanced, and ready to bolt on, typically within 1 to 2 business days for in-stock items. Financing is available through Affirm, Snap Finance, and Acima, covering buyers across the credit spectrum including no-credit and bad-credit options. Fitment is verified by staff (bolt pattern, offset, hub bore, brake clearance) before any package ships.

## Shopping

- [Tire Deals](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Tires): Current tire pricing, sizes, and promotions.
- [Wheel Deals](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Wheels): Custom wheels across major styles, finishes, and diameters.
- [Wheel and Tire Packages](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Wheel_and_Tire_Packages): Bundled sets shipped mounted and balanced.
- [Accessories](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Accessories): Lug nuts, hub rings, TPMS sensors, and related add-ons.
- [Tire Brands](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Buy_Tires): Browse tires by manufacturer.
- [Wheel Brands](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Buy_Wheels): Browse wheels by manufacturer.

## Order and Financing

- [Order Tracking](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Order_Tracking): Check the status of an existing order.
- [Financing Overview](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Financing): Affirm, Snap Finance, and Acima, including options for buyers with no credit or bad credit.
- [Wheels Financing](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Wheels_Financing): Financing terms specific to custom wheel purchases.
- [Tire Financing](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Tires_Financing): Financing terms specific to tire purchases.

## Fitment Tools and Calculators

- [Wheel Visualizer](https://www.performanceplustire.com/wheel-visualizer): Render wheels on your vehicle before buying.
- [Plus/Minus Sizing Calculator](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Plus_Minus_Sizing_Calculator): Convert between tire sizes while preserving overall diameter.
- [Advanced Tire Size Calculator](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Advanced_Tire_Size_Calculator): Detailed dimensional and speedometer-impact calculator.
- [Antique and Classic Tire Size Conversion](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Antique_Classic_Tire_Size_Conversion): Translate vintage tire markings to modern equivalents.
- [Bolt Pattern Conversion Chart](https://www.performanceplustire.com/bolt-pattern-conversion-chart-mm-to-inches): Convert bolt patterns between millimeters and inches.
- [Bolt Patterns Reference](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Bolt_Patterns): Bolt pattern lookup by application.
- [Hub Bore Guide](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Custom_Wheel_Hub_Bore): Hub-centric vs. lug-centric fitment explained.
- [Wheel Offset Explained](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Car_and_Truck_Wheel_Offset_Explained): Offset and backspacing fundamentals.
- [Wheel Finishes](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Custom_Wheel_Finish): Visual reference for available finishes.
- [Technical Information](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Tech_Information_Pages): Index of technical reference pages.

## Buyer's Guides

- [Custom Wheels: The Ultimate Guide](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Custom_Wheels_The_Ultimate_Guide): Comprehensive overview of custom wheel selection.
- [Off-Road Rims and Wheels](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Off-Road_Rims_and_Wheels): Off-road wheel sizing, durability, and styles.
- [Chrome Rims: The Ultimate Guide](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Chrome_Rims_The_Ultimate_Guide): Chrome finish selection and care.
- [Tires 101](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Tires_101_A_Comprehensive_Guide_to_Understanding): Beginner-friendly tire fundamentals.
- [Aftermarket Tires Guide](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Aftermarket_Tires_Guide_to_Choosing_the_Right_Ones): How to choose the right aftermarket tire.
- [Whitewall Tires Guide](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Whitewall_Tires_Guide): Whitewall styles, widths, and applications.
- [Tire UTQG Ratings](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Tires_UTQG_Ratings): Treadwear, traction, and temperature ratings explained.
- [Tire Warranty Information](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Tire_Warranty_from_Tire_Manufacturer): Overview of manufacturer warranties.

## Blog and Editorial

- [Blog Home](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Blog): Articles on tires, wheels, and the collector-car community.
- [How to Finance New Tires](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Blog/how-to-finance-new-tires-in-2025): Financing options including bad-credit and no-credit-check paths.
- [Fuel vs Method Wheels: Smart Buyer's Guide](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Blog/fuel-vs-method-wheels-smart-buyers-guide-2025): Side-by-side off-road wheel brand comparison.
- [Wheel and Tire Financing Providers Compared](https://www.performanceplustire.com/Blog/wheel-and-tire-financing-affirm-vs-progressive-vs-snap-vs-acima-2025): Comparison of major financing options.

## Sample Wheel Sizes

A non-exhaustive sample of available wheel-size landing pages. Most common sizes from 13" through 26" are stocked.

- [15x4.5](https://www.performanceplustire.com/15X4_5_Inch_Wheels)
- [16.5x9.75](https://www.performanceplustire.com/16_5X9_75_Inch_Wheels)
- [17x7.5](https://www.performanceplustire.com/17X7_5_Inch_Wheels)
- [18x8.5](https://www.performanceplustire.com/18X8_5_Inch_Wheels)
- [19x9](https://www.performanceplustire.com/19X9_Inch_Wheels)
- [20x14](https://www.performanceplustire.com/20X14_Inch_Wheels)

## Sample Tire Sizes

A non-exhaustive sample of available tire-size landing pages, including hard-to-find vintage and classic sizes.

- [185/70R14](https://www.performanceplustire.com/18570R14_Tires)
- [195/70R15](https://www.performanceplustire.com/19570R15_Tires)
- [235/50R13](https://www.performanceplustire.com/23550R13_Tires)
- [LT265/60R20](https://www.performanceplustire.com/LT26560R20_Tires)
- [LT265/65R18](https://www.performanceplustire.com/LT26565R18_Tires)
